shots.title: Quiet Rows at My Desk
shots.camera: first-person seated wide view, subtle slow push-in down the row of iMacs, steady fluorescent-lit composition
shots.action: From my seat, the ordered iMac rows, keyboards, blackboard, and the lone person at the back settle into view as the room stays almost perfectly still.
shots.transition_goal: Establish the lab layout, solitary mood, and first-person perspective before narrowing into concentration.
shots.voiceover_line: I stayed later than I meant to.

shots.title: Stillness Gets Loud
shots.camera: first-person medium-wide hold with a slight drift forward, then a gentle upward tilt toward the far side of the room
shots.action: The repeating monitors and desks begin to feel hypnotic; I pause working and let my gaze lift away from the screen toward the brighter edge of the lab.
shots.transition_goal: Shift from focused work to quiet fatigue and motivate the look toward the window.
shots.voiceover_line: The lab had gone quiet enough for every click and hum to feel louder than my thoughts.

shots.title: Turning Toward the Glass
shots.camera: first-person bridge shot, slow pan and slight rise from the interior rows toward the window, ending framed by the metal mullions
shots.action: My attention leaves the iMac rows and crosses the room toward the window, carrying the fluorescent interior into the cooler overcast light beyond the glass.
shots.transition_goal: Create a natural eyeline bridge from lab interior to exterior view without an abrupt location jump.
shots.voiceover_line: After staring at the screen too long, I looked up.

shots.title: Wet Alley Below
shots.camera: first-person static-to-gently-breathing window view, held composition through the large frame and roller blind
shots.action: Through the window, the wet alley, concrete wall, office windows, and dumpster sit in rain-dark stillness while the indoor framing keeps me rooted inside the building.
shots.transition_goal: Expand the world outward and let the reflective pause fully land.
shots.voiceover_line: I let my eyes drift past the room, past the glass, out into the wet alley below.

shots.title: Suspended Between Light and Rain
shots.camera: first-person bridge shot, slow pullback from the window with a soft pan back into the fluorescent lab
shots.action: The exterior view lingers for a beat, then I ease back from the glass and reorient toward the quiet classroom, carrying the calm of the alley inward.
shots.transition_goal: Tie the exterior reflection back to the work waiting inside and prepare the closing resolve.
shots.voiceover_line: For a minute, the whole day felt suspended there between fluorescent light and rain-dark concrete.

shots.title: Back to the Work
shots.camera: first-person settled wide shot, minimal movement, held on the rows of iMacs and quiet room
shots.action: The lab comes back into full view, unchanged but calmer now, with the rows of computers and ceiling lights feeling steady rather than draining.
shots.transition_goal: Resolve the sequence with acceptance and a sense of continuing the night quietly.
shots.voiceover_line: I wasn't finished, but I wasn't rushing anymore either.
